{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323141123D6C59BCE1FFDF95D63BE"}"},"total":954},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7613702859352294168","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"推荐！
在现女主的影响下，原女主由一个想依附强者而生存的人，通过自己的努力，逐渐变强，并一步步走到现女主身边，并得到现女主的认可，最终也成为了他人的明灯。小队里的人与一些配角也因现女主的影响而有各自的人生与归宿，人与人之间的羁绊丝丝入扣。在人性的刻画上没有一味的非黑即白，多了人性的剖析与思考。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772706670,"group_id":"7500995101527641150","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxrxloJRT3ubIr26gKcd5hM=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"467726943662132","user_name":"冥灵岛的雨化田"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"467726943662132","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7500995101527641150","book_info":{"abstract":"【无CP+爽文+女强+丧尸+动植物变异+穿越+重生+群像+高冷嘴毒+洁癖公主病】
穿越末世，别人囤物资，蓝曦身为僵尸，酷酷囤鸭血。
天道给她安排了身份，成为男主好兄弟的妹妹。
哥哥的火系异能，做麻辣铁板鸭血，好吃！
空间、治愈双异能女主，等于大容量保鲜鸭血储存箱。
一直被嫌弃的风雷双异能男主，有一天也终于被发现了妙用。
风系异能可以将鸭血切薄片，雷系电一下食材会更入味儿。
蓝曦发现，只要奴役了男女主，即便在末世，她也能过上吃喝不愁的好日子~
…
小说女主苏灵上辈子尝尽了末世的苦楚，重来一次，她决定抱紧末世最强异能者的‘大腿’！
可她忽然发现，上辈子的最强异能者裴景修，在那位高贵冷艳、实力强横的大小姐面前，顶多就算个打杂的！
既如此，她当然要换个‘大腿’抱！
得知自己的治愈系异能可以结束末世时。
苏灵：“如果牺牲我一个人，能救下更多人，我该怎么选择？”
蓝曦：“说明你比他们都重要，所以他们都该死。”
苏灵：(#^.^#)忽然又重新开朗了呢~
…
裴景修回想这一生，觉得自己做的最对的一件事就是抱对‘大腿’。
毕竟自己当‘大腿’多累啊~
跟着大佬，他躺赢！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/46e65a9d702cb9cd7a08fd39b7bcab65","author":"墨清清","author_id":"","book_id":"7500995101527641150","book_name":"末世僵尸女配，满级大佬度假日常","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7500995326329766462","read_count":"27511","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"626933"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"274","tags":"科幻末世,穿越,末世,女强,无CP,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8733fecd4f9f837a36a4bd9cae604d1c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779430283&x-signature=5h2sbIXZEd9Jp2uxi0A7XKQSfx4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2806419326253416","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"202"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323141123D6C59BCE1FFDF95D63BE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读20小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":10, ead_book_count":0,"read_duration":31322,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":9803},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7526821766552142654","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，妥妥就是大女主文，她从来不是谁的附庸，更不是等待被拯救的符号。在这片被绝望啃噬的土地上，她自己就是风暴中心，是劈开长夜的惊雷，是所有幸存者眼里“能活下去”的唯一注脚。她不需要谁来并肩，因为她一个人的力量，就足以撑起一片天。那些说“女人需要依靠”的陈词滥调，在她这里碎得连渣都不剩。她的强大从不是孤勇，是精准的判断，是狠厉的决断，是把所有情绪碾碎了揉进战术里的清醒。没有爱情线的羁绊，反而让她的光芒更纯粹——她不是谁的另一半，她是完整的、独立的、能凭一己之力在末世里撕开生路的王者。这样的她，不需要用“有没有人爱”来证明价值。她本身的存在，就是对“强大”最掷地有声的注解。","text_exts":[{"e":11,"s":8,"text":"大女主","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A4%A7%E5%A5%B3%E4%B8%BB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774246283F95D63BE%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227526821766552142654%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227500995101527641150%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A4%A7%E5%A5%B3%E4%B8%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752478802,"group_id":"7500995101527641150","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢把书签夹在打动我的句子旁——那是我和故事偷偷约定的。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8f00inkX1KPTxx9cGzyYwc=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7008e32c64fa48efac28557fcb46eb2d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796049&x-signature=h6KXvhB7ULPIzly7sh%2FBloKyqV8%3D","user_id":"273142495333213","user_name":"雾漫松梢听竹语"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"273142495333213","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,
